title: thelypodiopsis vermicularis
side_effects: Thelypodiopsis vermicularis can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and digestive problems. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant's extract may lead to nausea, dizziness, and headaches. In severe cases, improper use of thelypodiopsis vermicularis can also cause respiratory issues, such as coughing and shortness of breath. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for any health benefits to avoid these potential side effects.
